stacks.name: Next.js (App Router)
stacks.folderStructure: app/ or src/app/, public/, package.json, next.config.* — use CLI; do not hand-write the full tree.
pitfalls: Vite/Next: after background dev server, use read_terminal_output for PostCSS errors.
Tailwind v4 with PostCSS: use '@tailwindcss/postcss' in postcss.config — never bare tailwindcss: {} as the only plugin.

stacks.name: React + Vite (TypeScript)
stacks.folderStructure: src/, index.html, vite.config.ts — scaffold with npm create vite, then edit.
pitfalls: Run npm install after create before dev server.

stacks.name: Django
stacks.scaffoldCommand: python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install django && .venv\Scripts\django-admin startproject config .
stacks.folderStructure: manage.py, config/settings.py, config/urls.py, apps/ — use django-admin startproject.
pitfalls: On macOS/Linux use source .venv/bin/activate and pip/django-admin without Scripts path.

stacks.name: FastAPI
stacks.folderStructure: main.py or app/ package with FastAPI() instance — minimal files only after venv+pip.
pitfalls: Create main.py with app = FastAPI() if missing after pip install.

stacks.name: Spring Boot (Java)
stacks.scaffoldCommand: curl -fsSL https://start.spring.io/starter.zip -d type=maven-project -d language=java -d bootVersion=3.4.0 -d baseDir=. -d groupId=com.example -d artifactId=app -d name=app -d packageName=com.example.app -d dependencies=web -o spring.zip && tar -xf spring.zip 2>nul || powershell -Command "Expand-Archive -Path spring.zip -DestinationPath . -Force" && del spring.zip 2>nul
stacks.folderStructure: src/main/java, pom.xml or build.gradle — generate via start.spring.io, not hand-written Maven tree.
pitfalls: On Windows prefer curl+Expand-Archive or mvn wrapper; verify Java 17+.

stacks.name: .NET
stacks.folderStructure: Program.cs, App.csproj, Controllers/ — dotnet new only in empty folder.

stacks.name: Go
stacks.folderStructure: go.mod, main.go — go mod init then minimal main.go.

stacks.name: Rust
stacks.folderStructure: Cargo.toml, src/main.rs — cargo init in empty dir.

stacks.name: Laravel (PHP)
stacks.folderStructure: artisan, app/, routes/, .env — composer create-project only.

stacks.name: Ruby on Rails
stacks.folderStructure: app/, config/, Gemfile — rails new in empty directory.
